title: LineChart with Multiple Series
description: Responsive line chart with multiple data series, tooltips, legends, and animated dots.
content:
# LineChart with Multiple Series

```jsx
import {LineChart, Line, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, Legend, ResponsiveContainer} from 'recharts';

const data = [
  {name: 'Jan', uv: 4000, pv: 2400},
  {name: 'Feb', uv: 3000, pv: 1398},
  {name: 'Mar', uv: 2000, pv: 9800},
  {name: 'Apr', uv: 2780, pv: 3908},
  {name: 'May', uv: 1890, pv: 4800},
];

function SimpleLineChart() {
  return (
    <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={300}>
      <LineChart data={data}>
        <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" />
        <XAxis dataKey="name" />
        <YAxis />
        <Tooltip />
        <Legend />
        <Line type="monotone" dataKey="pv" stroke="#8884d8" activeDot={{r: 8}} />
        <Line type="monotone" dataKey="uv" stroke="#82ca9d" />
      </LineChart>
    </ResponsiveContainer>
  );
}
```

**Category:** Charts
**URL:** https://recharts.org/en-US/api/LineChart

title: Stacked BarChart
description: Responsive stacked bar chart with multiple series using stackId.
content:
# Stacked BarChart

```jsx
import {BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, Legend, ResponsiveContainer} from 'recharts';

const data = [
  {name: 'Page A', uv: 4000, pv: 2400},
  {name: 'Page B', uv: 3000, pv: 1398},
  {name: 'Page C', uv: 2000, pv: 9800},
];

function StackedBarChart() {
  return (
    <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={300}>
      <BarChart data={data}>
        <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" />
        <XAxis dataKey="name" />
        <YAxis />
        <Tooltip />
        <Legend />
        <Bar dataKey="pv" stackId="a" fill="#8884d8" />
        <Bar dataKey="uv" stackId="a" fill="#82ca9d" />
      </BarChart>
    </ResponsiveContainer>
  );
}
```

Use `stackId` prop on Bar components to stack them. Same stackId = same stack.

**Category:** Charts
**URL:** https://recharts.org/en-US/api/BarChart

title: PieChart with Custom Labels
description: Pie chart with custom percentage labels and color cells.

title: ComposedChart - Mixed Chart Types
description: Combining Area, Bar, and Line in a single chart using ComposedChart.
content:
# ComposedChart - Mixed Chart Types

Combine Area, Bar, and Line in one chart.

```jsx
import {ComposedChart, Line, Area, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, Legend, ResponsiveContainer} from 'recharts';

const data = [
  {name: 'Page A', uv: 590, pv: 800, amt: 1400},
  {name: 'Page B', uv: 868, pv: 967, amt: 1506},
  {name: 'Page C', uv: 1397, pv: 1098, amt: 989},
];

function MixedChart() {
  return (
    <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={300}>
      <ComposedChart data={data}>
        <CartesianGrid stroke="#f5f5f5" />
        <XAxis dataKey="name" />
        <YAxis />
        <Tooltip />
        <Legend />
        <Area type="monotone" dataKey="amt" fill="#8884d8" stroke="#8884d8" />
        <Bar dataKey="pv" barSize={20} fill="#413ea0" />
        <Line type="monotone" dataKey="uv" stroke="#ff7300" />
      </ComposedChart>
    </ResponsiveContainer>
  );
}
```

**Category:** Charts
**URL:** https://recharts.org/en-US/api/ComposedChart

title: Bar Animation Configuration
description: Configuring animation properties for Bar components including duration, easing, and callbacks.
content:
# Bar Animation Configuration

```jsx
<Bar
  dataKey="value"
  fill="#8884d8"
  isAnimationActive={true}
  animationBegin={0}
  animationDuration={1500}
  animationEasing="ease-in-out"
  onAnimationStart={() => console.log('started')}
  onAnimationEnd={() => console.log('done')}
/>
```

Disable for SSR: `isAnimationActive={false}`

Available easing: 'ease', 'ease-in', 'ease-out', 'ease-in-out', 'linear'.

**Category:** Components
**URL:** https://recharts.org/en-US/api/Bar

title: Custom Bar Shape
description: Using the shape prop on Bar to render custom SVG shapes.

title: ResponsiveContainer
description: Wrapper component for responsive chart sizing.
content:
# ResponsiveContainer

All Recharts charts need fixed dimensions. ResponsiveContainer wraps them for responsive sizing.

```jsx
import {ResponsiveContainer, BarChart, Bar} from 'recharts';

<ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={300}>
  <BarChart data={data}>
    <Bar dataKey="value" />
  </BarChart>
</ResponsiveContainer>
```

Props:
- `width`: string or number (default '100%')
- `height`: number (required, no % allowed)
- `aspect`: number (width/height ratio, alternative to height)
- `minWidth`, `minHeight`: minimum dimensions
- `debounce`: resize debounce in ms

**Category:** Components
**URL:** https://recharts.org/en-US/api/ResponsiveContainer

title: Treemap for Hierarchical Data
description: Treemap visualization with rectangular tiles sized by data values.
content:
# Treemap for Hierarchical Data

```jsx
import {Treemap, ResponsiveContainer, Tooltip} from 'recharts';

const data = [
  {name: 'axis', size: 8000},
  {name: 'legend', size: 3000},
  {name: 'tooltip', size: 5000},
  {name: 'chart', size: 12000}
];

<ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={300}>
  <Treemap data={data} dataKey="size" aspectRatio={4/3} stroke="#fff" fill="#8884d8">
    <Tooltip />
  </Treemap>
</ResponsiveContainer>
```

Treemaps show part-to-whole relationships. dataKey determines tile size. Supports nested children for hierarchical data. aspectRatio controls layout proportions.

title: ScatterChart and BubbleChart with ZAxis
description: Scatter plot with optional Z-axis for bubble size visualization.
content:
# ScatterChart and BubbleChart with ZAxis

```jsx
import {ScatterChart, Scatter, XAxis, YAxis, ZAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, Legend, ResponsiveContainer} from 'recharts';

const data = [
  {x: 100, y: 200, z: 200},
  {x: 120, y: 100, z: 260},
  {x: 170, y: 300, z: 400}
];

<ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={300}>
  <ScatterChart>
    <CartesianGrid />
    <XAxis type="number" dataKey="x" />
    <YAxis type="number" dataKey="y" />
    <ZAxis type="number" dataKey="z" range={[60, 400]} />
    <Tooltip cursor={{strokeDasharray: '3 3'}} />
    <Legend />
    <Scatter name="Series A" data={data} fill="#8884d8" />
  </ScatterChart>
</ResponsiveContainer>
```

ZAxis controls bubble size. range prop sets min/max bubble radius in pixels.

title: Interactive Legend with Toggle Visibility
description: Legend that toggles line visibility on click using hide prop.

title: Custom Axis Tick Components
description: Using custom React components for axis tick labels with rotation and formatting.
content:
# Custom Axis Tick Components

```tsx
const CustomizedAxisTick = ({x, y, payload}) => (
  <g transform={`translate(${x},${y})`}>
    <text 
      x={0} y={0} dy={16} 
      textAnchor="end" 
      fill="#666" 
      transform="rotate(-35)"
    >
      {payload.value}
    </text>
  </g>
);

<XAxis dataKey="name" tick={<CustomizedAxisTick />} />
```

For simple formatting without custom components, use tickFormatter:

```jsx
<YAxis tickFormatter={(value) => `$${value}`} />
<XAxis tickFormatter={(value) => value.toUpperCase()} />
```

tickFormatter is simpler for basic transformations. Custom tick components needed for complex layouts (rotation, conditional formatting).

title: Keyboard Accessibility
description: Enabling keyboard navigation and screen reader support with accessibilityLayer.
content:
# Keyboard Accessibility

All chart types support keyboard navigation and screen reader accessibility when accessibilityLayer is enabled (default on). Supported: AreaChart, BarChart, LineChart, ComposedChart, ScatterChart, PieChart, RadarChart, RadialBarChart, FunnelChart, Treemap, Sankey, SunburstChart.

```jsx
<LineChart 
  data={data}
  accessibilityLayer
>
  <XAxis dataKey="name" />
  <YAxis />
  <Line dataKey="value" />
</LineChart>
```

accessibilityLayer ensures:
- Proper ARIA labels for screen readers
- Keyboard navigation support (Tab, Arrow keys)
- Focus indicators for interactive elements
- Semantic HTML structure

Access is enabled by default. Set `accessibilityLayer={false}` only if needed for performance or custom accessibility implementation.
